name: Golf Lessons NYC
address: 108 W 39th St Rm 310, New York, NY 10018
about: Evan Cather Golf Instruction operates as a premier golf training studio in New York City. The primary locations are The Hack Shack, a simulator facility in Midtown Manhattan, and Randalls Island Golf Center, a full-length driving range. The venues offer advanced technology instruction using Trackman 4 simulators and pressure mats, catering to players of all skill levels from tour professionals to complete beginners. Lesson packages range from single one-hour sessions to multi-lesson series, providing structured coaching opportunities with an emphasis on personalized video analysis and prescribed drills for improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman 4 simulator technology used on the PGA Tour
Comprehensive lesson packages with personalized video analysis and prescribed drills
Instruction from a Jim McLean Master Instructor with experience at top golf schools
Facilities located in convenient Manhattan locations for urban golfers

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator technology with pressure mat integration

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, golf lessons would typically require clubs. Students should bring their own equipment or inquire about rental availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No information on outside food or drink policies is available. Contact the venue directly for specific guidelines.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As a training facility focused on lessons rather than full rounds, there is no specific time frame provided for completing 18 holes. The primary offerings are structured lesson sessions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information indicates the facility is designed for children. The focus appears to be on serious golf instruction for adults of all skill levels.
